Next page 1 Ericaceous Formula 2 Blend Of 11 Nutrients 3 Results In 7 Days 4 Pet & Child Friendly Miracle-Gro plant food is renowned for its ‘grows twice as big’ results Miracle-Gro Azalea, Camellia & Rhododendron Soluble Plant Food is specially formulated for acid-loving or lime-hating plants. Ideal for all ericaceous and acid loving plants - indoors or outside - such as Berberis, Magnolia, Heather, Hydrangea and Pieris. Miracle-Gro Azalea, Camellia & Rhododendron Soluble Plant Food contains sequestered iron which is essential to prevent leaf yellowing and feeds for up to 2 weeks. Why should I use Miracle-Gro Azalea, Camellia & Rhododendron Soluble Plant Food? Plants need more than just water, they need the right balance of essential nutrients to grow and bloom their best. Miracle-Gro feeds your plants the nutrients they need that are ​easily absorbed to grow your plants twice as big versus unfed plants! Where can I use Miracle-Gro Azalea, Camellia & Rhododendron Soluble Plant Food? Miracle-Gro Azalea, Camellia & Rhododendron Soluble Plant Food is ideal for all ericaceous (acid-loving, lime-hating) plants. Perfect for use on ericaceous plants in pots and containers, beds and borders. When should I use Miracle-Gro Azalea, Camellia & Rhododendron Soluble Plant Food? Use Miracle-Gro Azalea, Camellia & Rhododendron Soluble Plant Food between March and September, when plants are actively growing. Feed every 2 weeks. How do I use Miracle-Gro Azalea, Camellia & Rhododendron Soluble Plant Food? Refer to pack for dosage size to dissolve in water, depending on plants type. Soak the soil around the plant base and wet the leaves with with a fine rose on a water can. Feed every 2 weeks when plants are actively growing.
